segments:
EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT
This Employment Agreement (the "Agreement") is made and entered into as of October 1,
2023, by and between Globex Corporation ("Employer") and John Doe ("Employee").
1. Term of Employment and Termination
The Employer agrees to employ the Employee, and the Employee agrees to be employed by
the Employer, on an at-will basis. The Employer may terminate this Agreement immediately
without cause, without notice, and without any severance compensation.
2. Confidentiality
The Employee agrees to keep confidential all proprietary information, trade secrets, and client
lists during the term of employment and for a period of two years thereafter.
3. Limitation of Liability
The Employee agrees that the Employer's liability under this agreement, whether arising out
of contract, negligence, or any other cause of action, shall be completely unlimited and
without financial cap for any damages the Employee may suffer.
4. Governing Law
This Agreement shall be construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Texas.
5. Base Salary and Payment
The Employee shall receive a base salary of $120,000 per year, payable in bi-weekly
installments in accordance with the Employer's standard payroll practices.
